items.front:
Ex 1: Dog Years 🐕

Your dog is 5 years old. How old is your dog in human years?
items.hint:
Equation: H = 7D

D = dog years = 5
H = 7 × 5 = 35

items.front:
Ex 2: Plant Growth 🌱

A tomato plant starts at 2 inches tall and grows 1.5 inches per week. After 6 weeks, what is its height?
items.hint:
Equation: H = 2 + 1.5W

W = weeks = 6
H = 2 + (1.5 × 6)
H = 2 + 9 = 11

items.front:
Ex 3: Height Growth 📏

You were 48 inches tall at age 8 and grow 2.5 inches per year. How tall will you be at age 14?
items.hint:
Equation: H = 48 + 2.5Y
(Y = years after age 8)

Y = 14 - 8 = 6 years
H = 48 + (2.5 × 6)
H = 48 + 15 = 63

items.front:
Ex 4: Moon Phases 🌙

The moon completes one cycle of phases every 29.5 days. How many days will pass after 8 complete cycles?
items.hint:
Equation: D = 29.5C

C = cycles = 8
D = 29.5 × 8 = 236

items.front:
Ex 5: Pizza Party 🍕

Each pizza has 8 slices. If you order 4 pizzas for a party, how many total slices will you have?
items.hint:
Equation: S = 8P

P = pizzas = 4
S = 8 × 4 = 32

items.front:
Ex 6: Coins in Your Pocket 💰

You have 6 quarters and 12 dimes. What is the total value in cents?
items.hint:
Equation: V = 25Q + 10D

Q = quarters = 6
D = dimes = 12
V = (25 × 6) + (10 × 12)
V = 150 + 120 = 270 cents

items.front:
Ex 7: Road Trip 🚗

Your family drives at 60 mph for 5 hours. How far did you travel?
items.hint:
Equation: D = S × T

S = speed = 60 mph
T = time = 5 hours
D = 60 × 5 = 300 miles

items.front:
Ex 8: Phone Battery 📱

Your phone battery drains 5% per hour of use. If you start at 100%, what is your battery level after 8 hours?

Ex 9: Recipe Scaling 🍳

A recipe for 4 people uses 2 cups of flour. You're making it for 12 people (3× the original). How much flour do you need?
items.hint:
Equation: New = Original × Scale

Original = 2 cups
Scale = 12 ÷ 4 = 3
New = 2 × 3 = 6 cups

items.front:
Ex 10: Sports Scoring ⚽

In basketball, 3-pointers are worth 3 points and 2-pointers are worth 2 points. If a player makes 8 three-pointers and 15 two-pointers, how many total points?
items.hint:
Equation: P = 3X + 2Y

X = three-pointers = 8
Y = two-pointers = 15
P = (3 × 8) + (2 × 15)
P = 24 + 30 = 54 points

items.front:
Ex 11: Temperature Conversion 🌡️

Convert 25°C to Fahrenheit.

Ex 12: Lightning Distance ⚡

During a thunderstorm, you count 20 seconds between the lightning flash and the thunder sound. How far away is the lightning in miles?
items.hint:
Equation: D = S ÷ 5

S = seconds = 20
D = 20 ÷ 5 = 4 miles

(Sound travels ~1 mile every 5 seconds)

items.front:
Ex 13: Daylight Hours 🌅

In June (summer), there are about 15 hours of daylight. In December (winter), there are about 9 hours. What is the difference?
items.hint:
Equation: Difference = Summer - Winter

Summer = 15 hours
Winter = 9 hours
Difference = 15 - 9 = 6 hours

This happens because Earth's axis is tilted 23.5°

items.front:
Ex 14: Calories Burned 🏃

Running burns about 8 calories per minute. If you run for 45 minutes, how many calories do you burn?
items.hint:
Equation: C = 8M

M = minutes = 45
C = 8 × 45 = 360 calories

items.front:
Ex 15: Musical Frequencies 🎵

The frequency of a musical note doubles when you go up one octave. Middle C is 262 Hz. What is the frequency of C two octaves higher?
items.hint:
Equation: F = 262 × 2^Octaves

Octaves = 2
F = 262 × 2²
F = 262 × 4 = 1048 Hz

items.front:
Ex 1: Video Game Fun 🎮

Emma is buying video games. Each game costs $2, and she also buys snacks for $5. Her total bill is $13.

How many video games did she buy?
items.hint:
Equation: 2x + 5 = 13
x = number of games

2x + 5 = 13
2x = 13 - 5
2x = 8
x = 8 ÷ 2 = 4

items.front:
Ex 2: Marble Champion 🔵

Miguel plays marble games and wins 3 marbles in each round. After winning, he loses 4 marbles accidentally. Now he has 8 marbles.

How many rounds did he win?
items.hint:
Equation: 3y - 4 = 8
y = number of rounds

3y - 4 = 8
3y = 8 + 4
3y = 12
y = 12 ÷ 3 = 4

items.front:
Ex 3: Lollipop Collection 🍭

At the candy store, each bag gives you 4 lollipops. You also get 2 bonus lollipops, but you drop 1 on the floor. You end up with 9 lollipops.

How many bags did you buy?
items.hint:
Equation: 4z + 2 - 1 = 9
z = number of bags

4z + 1 = 9
4z = 9 - 1
4z = 8
z = 8 ÷ 4 = 2

items.front:
Ex 4: Soccer Star ⚽

Sarah is the soccer team's top scorer. She scores 5 points per goal, but the referee gave her a 3-point penalty. Her final score is 22 points.

How many goals did she score?
items.hint:
Equation: 5a - 3 = 22
a = number of goals

5a - 3 = 22
5a = 22 + 3
5a = 25
a = 25 ÷ 5 = 5

items.front:
Ex 5: Chore Money 💰

You earn $2 for each chore. Your grandma gives you a $6 birthday gift. But you spend $2 on candy. Now you have $14 total.

How many chores did you do?
items.hint:
Equation: 2b + 6 - 2 = 14
b = number of chores

2b + 4 = 14
2b = 14 - 4
2b = 10
b = 10 ÷ 2 = 5

items.front:
Ex 6: Book Collector 📚

Jake is organizing books on shelves. Each shelf holds 6 books, but he keeps 8 favorites on his desk. He has 10 books on shelves total.

How many shelves is he using?
items.hint:
Equation: 6c - 8 = 10
c = number of shelves

6c - 8 = 10
6c = 10 + 8
6c = 18
c = 18 ÷ 6 = 3

items.front:
Ex 7: Library Shelves 📖

Your bedroom library has shelves that hold 3 books each. You also keep 4 books on your nightstand. In total, you have 19 books.

How many shelves do you have?
items.hint:
Equation: 3d + 4 = 19
d = number of shelves

3d + 4 = 19
3d = 19 - 4
3d = 15
d = 15 ÷ 3 = 5

items.front:
Ex 8: Treasure Hunt 💎

You find coins in your couch! You discover 5 coins in each cushion. After spending 5 coins on gum and 2 on stickers, you have 8 coins left.

How many cushions did you search?
items.hint:
Equation: 5e - 5 - 2 = 8
e = number of cushions

5e - 7 = 8
5e = 8 + 7
5e = 15
e = 15 ÷ 5 = 3

items.front:
Ex 9: Sticker Album ⭐

Your sticker album is filling up! Each page holds 4 stickers. You have 3 extra stickers that don't fit. Your total collection is 23 stickers.

How many pages did you fill?
items.hint:
Equation: 4f + 3 = 23
f = number of pages

4f + 3 = 23
4f = 23 - 3
4f = 20
f = 20 ÷ 4 = 5

items.front:
Ex 10: Video Game Levels 🎯

You earn 2 points for each level you complete. You started with 8 bonus points. You lost 1 point for falling into a pit. Now you have 17 points.

How many levels did you complete?
items.hint:
Equation: 2g + 8 - 1 = 17
g = number of levels

2g + 7 = 17
2g = 17 - 7
2g = 10
g = 10 ÷ 2 = 5

items.front:
Ex 8

Solve for s:
⁴⁄₃s + 2 − ⅙ = −⅙
items.hint:
Equation: ⁴⁄₃s + 2 − ⅙ = −⅙

⁴⁄₃s + 2 = −⅙ + ⅙
⁴⁄₃s + 2 = 0
⁴⁄₃s = −2
s = −2 × (³⁄₄) = −1.5

Group like terms:

x terms: 3x − x = 2x
y terms: 2y = 2y
constants: 5 = 5

Answer: 2x + 2y + 5

Group like terms:

a terms: 4a − 2a = 2a
b terms: 3b + b = 4b
constants: −3 = −3

Answer: 2a + 4b − 3

Group like terms:

m terms: 5m − 3m = 2m
n terms: 7n − 2n = 5n
constants: 4 = 4

Answer: 2m + 5n + 4

Group like terms:

x terms: 2x + 4x = 6x
y terms: 3y − y = 2y
constants: 6 = 6

Answer: 6x + 2y + 6

Group like terms:

p terms: 6p + 2p = 8p
q terms: −4q + 3q = −q
constants: −8 = −8

Answer: 8p − q − 8

Group like terms:

x terms: −x + 3x = 2x
y terms: 5y − 2y = 3y
constants: 1 = 1

Answer: 2x + 3y + 1

Group like terms:

a terms: 8a − 3a = 5a
b terms: 2b − b = b
constants: 7 − 2 = 5

Answer: 5a + b + 5

Group like terms:

x terms: 3x + 2x = 5x
y terms: −y + 4y = 3y
constants: −5 + 3 = −2

Answer: 5x + 3y − 2

Group like terms:

m terms: −2m + 5m = 3m
n terms: 6n − 3n = 3n
constants: 4 − 9 = −5

Answer: 3m + 3n − 5

Group like terms:

r terms: 7r − 4r = 3r
s terms: 2s + 3s = 5s
constants: −6 + 1 = −5

Answer: 3r + 5s − 5

Group like terms:

x terms: 4x − 2x = 2x
y terms: 3y − 5y = −2y
constants: 10 − 3 = 7

Answer: 2x − 2y + 7

Group like terms:

a terms: −a + 6a = 5a
b terms: 8b − 3b = 5b
constants: 2 + 5 = 7

Answer: 5a + 5b + 7

items.front: What planet do we live on?
What do plants need to grow?
How many legs does a spider have?
How many senses do we have?
How many bones in human body?

pages.text: I put on my shoes. I shut the door.
We walk on the path. I see a shell!
Mom gets a bunch of cherries. Yum!
"Can I have chocolate?" I ask with a grin.
We pay and thank the man at the till.
Back home, I munch my chips on the mat.
"That was fun!" I say. Mom gives me a big hug.

content.subject: english
content.name: Bua Ji
paragraphs: Today we go to Bua Ji's house! I am so excited. Bua Ji always gives the best hugs.
We take the car. Papa drives. I look out the window and count the trees. One, two, three...
Bua Ji's house has a big garden. There are roses and sunflowers. I help water the plants.
We eat yummy food together. Bua Ji makes my favorite - aloo paratha! So delicious.
Before we leave, Bua Ji gives me a gift. It's a beautiful book with pictures of animals.
I love visiting Bua Ji. She makes everything feel special!

content.subject: english
content.name: Noni Mata
paragraphs: Noni Mata came to visit today! I ran to the door so fast when the bell rang.
She brought a big bag. What's inside? Surprises for everyone!
Noni Mata tells the best stories. She knows about kings and queens and magical forests.
We sit together on the sofa. She teaches me how to braid hair.
At night, Noni Mata sings songs. Her voice is so soft and sweet.
I wish Noni Mata could stay forever. I love her so much!

content.subject: english
content.name: Taya Ji
paragraphs: Taya Ji is so funny! He always makes everyone laugh.
Today Taya Ji took me to the park. We played on the swings and slides.
He taught me to fly a kite. Up, up, up it goes into the blue sky!
Taya Ji knows magic tricks. He can make coins disappear!
We had ice cream together. I chose chocolate, he chose mango.
Playing with Taya Ji is always an adventure!

content.subject: english
content.name: Dada Dadi
paragraphs: Dada Dadi's room is my favorite place in the whole house.
Dadi keeps special treats in a tin box. She gives me one every day!
Dada reads the newspaper. Sometimes he reads to me about animals and stars.
We look at old photo albums together. There are pictures of Papa when he was small like me!
Dadi teaches me prayers. We close our eyes and say them together.
I feel so loved when I'm with Dada and Dadi!

content.subject: english
content.name: Papa
paragraphs: Papa is my superhero! He can do anything.
In the morning, Papa makes breakfast. Eggs and toast - just the way I like it.
Papa helps me with homework. He explains things so I understand.
On weekends, we go for bike rides. Wind in my hair, Papa by my side!
Papa gives the best shoulder rides. I can touch the ceiling!
I want to be just like Papa when I grow up!

content.subject: hindi
content.name: गणेश जी जीते
paragraphs: एक बार शिव जी के पास मीठा फल था। दोनों बेटे — गणेश और कार्तिकेय — उसे चाहते थे।
शिव जी बोले, "जो पहले दुनिया का चक्कर लगाकर आएगा, फल उसी का।"
कार्तिकेय झट मोर पर बैठे और उड़ चले — पहाड़, नदी, जंगल पार करते गए।
गणेश जी ने नन्हे चूहे को देखा। सोचा, मुस्कुराए। फिर माँ-बाप के चारों ओर तीन चक्कर लगाए और बोले, "माँ-पिता ही मेरी पूरी दुनिया हैं।"
शिव जी हँसे, पार्वती जी की आँखें भर आईं। फल गणेश जी को मिला।
थोड़ी देर बाद कार्तिकेय थके-हारे लौटे — देखा तो भैया आराम से फल खा रहे थे!
तभी से हर शुभ काम में सबसे पहले गणेश जी को याद किया जाता है।

content.subject: hindi
content.name: कृष्ण जी और माखन
paragraphs: नन्हे कृष्ण जी बहुत शरारती थे। उन्हें माखन बहुत पसंद था।
माँ यशोदा माखन को ऊँचे मटके में छुपा देती थीं। पर कृष्ण जी चुप कहाँ बैठते!
उन्होंने अपने दोस्तों को बुलाया। सब मिलकर एक के ऊपर एक चढ़े। कृष्ण जी सबसे ऊपर पहुँचे और मटका फोड़ दिया।
माखन गिरा, सब हँसे, कृष्ण जी ने मुँह भर के खाया।
तभी माँ आ गईं! कृष्ण जी ने मीठी मुस्कान दी। माँ का गुस्सा पल में पिघल गया।
आज भी जन्माष्टमी पर बच्चे यही "दही-हांडी" खेल खेलते हैं।

content.subject: hindi
content.name: दुर्गा माँ और महिषासुर
paragraphs: बहुत समय पहले महिषासुर नाम का राक्षस था। उसे वरदान मिला था — कोई मर्द उसे हरा नहीं सकता। घमंड में आकर उसने स्वर्ग पर कब्ज़ा कर लिया।
सब देवता डरकर भागे। तब सबने मिलकर अपनी-अपनी शक्ति जोड़ी और एक तेज़ रोशनी से दुर्गा माँ प्रकट हुईं। दस हाथ, हर हाथ में एक हथियार, और शेर उनकी सवारी!
माँ शेर पर बैठकर युद्ध के मैदान में पहुँचीं। नौ दिन और नौ रातों तक भयंकर लड़ाई चली। दसवें दिन माँ ने त्रिशूल से महिषासुर का अंत कर दिया।
स्वर्ग में फिर से खुशी लौट आई। तभी से हर साल नवरात्रि के नौ दिन माँ की पूजा होती है, और दसवें दिन — दशहरा — बुराई पर अच्छाई की जीत मनाई जाती है।
